title: HealthRBAlarmOn Function
see_also: Returns the status of the parts consumption alarm for the specified robot parts.
examples:
Function PrintAlarm4 If HealthRBAlarmOn(1, HEALTH_ROBOT_TYPE_GREASE, 3) = True Then
   Print "Robot1 Joint2 Grease NG" Else
   Print "Robot1 Joint2 Grease OK" EndIf
Fend
